admit_now.reason: Useful official drug label retrieval for大众健康场景里的用药安全说明。
Useful for trial search and oncology support without direct patient matching conclusions.
High-value guideline retrieval for chief-led evidence support.
Useful regulatory and safety lookup surface for consumer health scenarios.

labs_candidates.reason: Unified biomedical search is powerful but introduces external API dependency.
High-value safety analysis, but output must be constrained to evidence briefs.
Useful for DDI evidence support, but should not directly provide prescription-level recommendations.

restricted_or_hold.reason: High clinical-boundary risk and no longer aligned with VitaClaw's mass-health product positioning.
Relevant domain, but VitaClaw mental line uses stricter support-only boundaries.

reject_for_direct_integration.reason: Serious-medical positioning mismatch and frequent proprietary-license risk.
Conflicting licensing signals and external pipeline dependency.
Product direction mismatch for everyday health avatar workflows.

rules: Never expose upstream raw output directly to ordinary users.
Default integration target is health-research, not health-main.
No upstream external skill may write MEMORY.md directly.
No group/public context may load long-term health memory.
All imported skills require per-skill license and dependency audit.
